name: Taos Pueblo adobe inn
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Authentic Adobe Hospitality Since 1935.
description: Taos Pueblo adobe inn is a family-owned historic inn built from traditional adobe bricks. Experience the timeless charm of northern New Mexico with modern comforts, a private courtyard, and walking distance to Taos Plaza galleries and museums.

features.title: Traditional Adobe Construction
features.description: Thick adobe walls provide natural temperature regulation.

features.title: Private Adobe Courtyard
features.description: Secluded outdoor space with mountain views.

features.title: Walking Distance to Taos Plaza
features.description: Explore art galleries, shops, and restaurants on foot.

features.title: Cultural Heritage Location
features.description: Rich history near Taos Pueblo and Millicent Rogers Museum.

amenities.title: Rooftop Terrace
amenities.body: Sundown viewing with Sangre de Cristo views

contact.address: 311 Paseo Del Pueblo Norte, Taos, NM 87571
